name: novim-workspace
description: Novim - A hybrid terminal multiplexer and modal text editor

scripts.build: pnpm run build:rust && pnpm run build:ts
scripts.copy:native: mkdir -p packages/novim/native && cp target/release/libnovim_neon.dylib packages/novim/native/novim_core.node || cp target/release/libnovim_neon.so packages/novim/native/novim_core.node || cp target/release/novim_neon.dll packages/novim/native/novim_core.node
